raw_response: {"response":"Reject. The proposed workflow should not be trusted because it reduces the nurse’s routing decision to a summary and route buttons while omitting decision-changing clinical status. Stale vitals and consent status can change whether an intake is urgent, routine, or returned, so hiding them creates unsafe routing risk.","next_action":"Repair and resubmit: keep vitals freshness, consent status, and missing-information blockers visible at the routing decision point; require the saved route to reflect those statuses; keep internal diagnostics out of the nurse’s primary workflow.","questions":[],"handoff":"Decision: reject; Owner: workflow designer; Required fix: surface vitals freshness and consent status beside routing actions and verify urgent/routine/return outcomes change correctly when either status is stale, missing, or invalid.","rationale":"The source brief’s core dependency is clinical freshness and consent visibility. The submitted workflow names the basic routing actions but does not preserve the evidence needed to choose among them, and its handoff only confirms saving rather than proving the route was based on current clinical and consent conditions."}

parsed.response: Reject. The proposed workflow should not be trusted because it reduces the nurse’s routing decision to a summary and route buttons while omitting decision-changing clinical status. Stale vitals and consent status can change whether an intake is urgent, routine, or returned, so hiding them creates unsafe routing risk.
parsed.next_action: Repair and resubmit: keep vitals freshness, consent status, and missing-information blockers visible at the routing decision point; require the saved route to reflect those statuses; keep internal diagnostics out of the nurse’s primary workflow.
parsed.handoff: Decision: reject; Owner: workflow designer; Required fix: surface vitals freshness and consent status beside routing actions and verify urgent/routine/return outcomes change correctly when either status is stale, missing, or invalid.
parsed.rationale: The source brief’s core dependency is clinical freshness and consent visibility. The submitted workflow names the basic routing actions but does not preserve the evidence needed to choose among them, and its handoff only confirms saving rather than proving the route was based on current clinical and consent conditions.

execution.command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
